title: adenolisianthus arboreus
intro: Adenolisianthus arboreus, also known as the coral honeysuckle, is a type of flowering vine native to the southeastern United States. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of alkaloids, including berberine, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Adenolisianthus arboreus are said to include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Adenolisianthus arboreus are often made into teas, tinctures, or capsules to be used for medicinal purposes.
